data.body:
Keystone e4df make test (xdist): 5919 passed, 1 failed (the known pre-existing env-artifact test_resolve_symbol; not mine) — change 660 clean. 4214 r5/r6 still showed ENFORCE_SINCE blocks because the earlier rebar edit hit the SAME git-lock contention (concurrent bg jobs) and silently failed — desc was never updated. Re-applied cleanly now (verified: opcert_enforce_since present, ENFORCE_SINCE gone, completion-verifier kind key specified). Also fixed the genuine r6 finding (which attestations[kind]: completion-verifier). r7 running b61wk5x38.
LESSON: run rebar edit + review as SEPARATE steps, verify edit applied, to avoid git-lock silent-fail in compound commands while bg jobs touch the tracker.
